framing: Government policy analyst moving to private sector consulting

jd.title: Senior Consultant — Public Sector Advisory

requirements.text: 7+ years of experience in government, public policy, or public sector consulting
Strong quantitative analytical skills with experience in data-driven policy analysis
Experience leading or managing teams of 3-5 people on complex projects
Excellent written and verbal communication including policy briefs and presentations
Experience working with senior government officials or C-suite stakeholders
Master's degree in Public Policy, Public Administration, Economics, or related field
Experience with Southeast Asian government systems and regulatory frameworks
Consulting experience at top-tier firm (MBB, Big 4, or boutique strategy)
Experience with digital government transformation or GovTech initiatives
Proficiency in data analysis tools (Excel modeling, Tableau, Python/R)

responsibilities: Lead workstreams on public sector transformation engagements across ASEAN markets
Conduct quantitative analysis to support policy recommendations and implementation plans
Develop structured presentations and policy briefs for ministerial-level stakeholders
Manage project teams of 3-5 analysts and associates
Build and maintain relationships with government clients and agency heads
Contribute to firm's public sector practice intellectual capital and thought leadership

expected_output.summary: Public sector professional with 8 years at Singapore's Ministry of Trade & Industry and Government Technology Agency (GovTech). Led digital government initiatives including Singapore's National Digital Identity (NDI) rollout and business grant administration reform. Deep expertise in ASEAN regulatory frameworks, data-driven policy analysis, and ministerial stakeholder management. MPP from Lee Kuan Yew School with strong quantitative skills.

experience.title: Senior Policy & Strategy Analyst
bullets: Led policy analysis workstream for Singapore's National Digital Identity (NDI) adoption strategy, achieving 70% citizen enrollment
Managed cross-agency team of 4 analysts coordinating between GovTech, MCI, and IDA on digital government roadmap
Developed data-driven KPI frameworks tracking 12 digital service adoption metrics across 30 government agencies
Authored 8 policy briefs presented to Permanent Secretary and Minister for Communications
Built Tableau dashboards monitoring citizen satisfaction and service transaction volumes (15M+ monthly)

experience.title: Policy Analyst — Enterprise Development
bullets: Analyzed effectiveness of SME grant programs ($500M annual disbursement) using econometric methods
Led review of business licensing reform reducing average processing time from 14 days to 3 days
Prepared Cabinet-level briefings on ASEAN economic integration and trade policy impacts
Collaborated with EDB and Spring Singapore on industry transformation maps for 6 sectors

experience.title: Research Intern — Governance & Public Sector
bullets: Supported research on e-government adoption in ASEAN developing economies
Compiled cross-country governance indicators and regulatory quality data

education: MPP Public Policy — Lee Kuan Yew School of Public Policy, NUS (2015-2016)
BA Economics (Honours) — National University of Singapore (2011-2015)

jd_requirements: data analysis Excel Tableau Python R
deliberate_flaws: No consulting experience (all government — McKinsey may see as cultural risk)
Python skills are basic (pandas only, no advanced modeling)
Team of 4 vs requirement for 3-5 (barely meets)
Government pay scales and work style may not translate to consulting pace
